description:
This video is a complete review of ICICI Lombard health AdvantEdge health insurance plan.
I have explained each and every features and benefits in detail.
This video also include in detail explanation of terms and conditions in this Advantedge Paln.

0:00 - Introduction
0:38 - Eligibility Criteria 
2:48 - Base coverage benefits
5:15 - Other benefits 
8:33 - Optional Benefits (Add-on)
9:00 - Maternity Benefits 
10:57 - waiting & survival period

#healthinsurance #icicilombard #advantedge

icic lombard health advantedge apex plus 2023
